message:
feat(storage): tick 143 mux-session/checkpoint cluster cx-first siblings (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Twenty-second sibling-expansion tick. Adds 6 new storage `_with_cx`
siblings for the mux-session and session-checkpoint cluster.

New siblings:
- insert_mux_session_with_cx (write path)
- insert_session_checkpoint_with_cx (write path)
- prune_session_checkpoints_with_cx (write path)
- mark_session_shutdown_clean_with_cx (write path)
- get_latest_checkpoint_hash_with_cx (read path)
- get_active_sessions_with_cx (read path)

Each sibling does a pre-flight `cx.checkpoint()?` for cancellation
budget honouring, then delegates to the unchanged legacy impl.

Test: `storage_tick143_mux_session_checkpoint_cluster_roundtrip` —
insert mux session → three checkpoints (periodic type; the DB's
CHECK constraint restricts checkpoint_type to
periodic/event/shutdown/startup) → get_latest returns newest hash →
prune retention=1 removes two older checkpoints while preserving
latest → mark_shutdown_clean → get_active_sessions (empty, since
AgentSession table is distinct from mux_sessions). Verified via
fork bypass: 490/490 storage:: tests pass.

Storage cx-first coverage: 101 + 6 = 107 siblings across 140 legacy
pub async fns. 33 legacy methods still lack a sibling; mux-session/
checkpoint cluster now fully covered.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
